# Security Policy ## Supported Versions | Version | Supported | | ------- | ------------------ | | `2.0.x` | `yes` | | `1.6.x` | `yes` | | `1.5.x` | `yes` | | `<1.5.x` | `no` | ## Reporting a Vulnerability To report a security vulnerability, please [`Open a draft security advisory`](https://github.com/mockery/mockery/security/advisories/new) so we can coordinate the fix and disclosure.
